title: phyllanthus rupestris
intro: Phyllanthus rupestris, also known as the rock Phyllanthus, is a flowering plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus rupestris include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus rupestris is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
